title: Hi, We run a business in Adelaide where we repair peoples credit files and we recently bought Monday. We need an expert to help us set up our business in Monday from scratch. Is there any help available?
excerpt: We need help with setting up our boards and flow of work

posts.author: MannySevastas (MANNY SEVASTAS)
posts.cookedHtml: We need help with setting up our boards and flow of work

posts.author: Adam_Integration (Adam Reavill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Manny,

We’re a Global Gold Monday.Com partner with over 20 years specialising in Workflow and Content in many industries.

We have a team of Monday experts and have developed a very popular ‘Fresh Start’ packages for reviewing, improving and onboarding Monday.com.

If you would like a quick call to see how we can help, please drop me a line Adam.reavill@iointegration.com

Thanks.

Adam Reavill | Senior Business Consultant
IO Integration | Mobile: +44 7951 916174
adam.reavill@iointegration.com
iointegration.com | Twitter | LinkedIn | Facebook

Please click here to schedule a meeting with me.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MannySevastas - welcome to the community!

We would love the opportunity to discuss your business and how we can be of assistance to get you up and running on monday.com with the perfect solution.

A little about us, we are a certified monday.com implementation partner and have been helping customers in a variety of industries get up and running and also optimize their current solutions. Everything we do is monday! Each of our Llamas are skilled in Development, Analysis, Project Management and Training.

We like to start with a complementary discovery session to go through your requirements, but also to ensure we are the best possible fit. If you would like to continue you can book your preferred time here: Book A Discovery Session - Green Llamas Consulting

Thanks @MannySevastas !
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: MannySevastas (MANNY SEVASTAS)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys,

Thanks for responding.

I will be in Adelaide on Wednesday and would love to have a chat with someone, but our times seem to be out of whack.

I would like to have a video meeting at around 10.30am Adelaide time on Wednesday 23rd November. Does that suit you guys?

Thanks

posts.author: MannySevastas (MANNY SEVASTAS)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mark,

Unfortunately, the times available on your booking system don’t work for us.

Is there a way we can talk to someone around 6pm Adelaide time?

Thanks

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MannySevastas

Not sure if you found something suitable already but upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialize in integrations and custom requirements. We have team members local to Adelaide and can accommodate meeting you whichever time of day will suit best.

Please feel free to return by email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to meet with you and better understand your objectives.

Chat with Peta

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream
